goal: List the files in the current directory and summarize the project structure

scope: Accuracy of file listing against actual filesystem

Entry points (main.go, service.go, provider.go) are correctly identified
disallowed_actions: No file creation or modification outside artifacts
verification_contract.notes: Read-only task. Build command is a sanity check only -- no tests needed.
